question:
Will Sabrina Carpenter say "Nervous" during SNL appearance on October 18?

Description: Sabrina Carpenter is scheduled to join the Saturday Night Live on October 18, 2025. (see: https://www.billboard.com/culture/tv-film/sabrina-carpenter-snl-promos-marcello-hernandez-1236091579/)

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Sabrina Carpenter says the listed term during this appearance. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Any usage of the term, regardless of context, will count toward the resolution of this market.

Pluralization/possessive of the term will count toward the resolution of this market; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person's first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about "Joe / Biden 5+ times," a mention of "Joe Biden" will count once).

If this appearance is definitively cancelled by Sabrina Carpenter or Saturday Night Live, or otherwise is not released by October 18, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No". If the appearance has not aired in its entirety by October 19, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve based on what has aired up to that point.

Resolution source: The resolution source will be audio/video of the appearance.

evidences.title: Sabrina Carpenter – Sharpest Tool Lyrics | Genius Lyrics
evidences.content: Genius Answer Whilst being interviewed at the Grammy Museum alongside fellow producer Jack Antonoff, on August 2nd; Sabrina was questioned what song off the forthcoming album she was most anticipating fans to listen too, she replied with: > I would say ”Sharpest Tool” […] it’s so special to me and it makes me nervous for sure” Jack then went on to state the prepositional track was one of his ‘favourite off the album’ Why is "Sharpest Tool" so important to Sabrina Carpenter? Genius Answer [...] We never talk about it (We don't talk about it, talk, talk, talk about it) We never talk about it (We don't talk about it, we don't talk about it) (We don't talk about it, we don't talk about it) [Refrain] We never talk about how you Found God at your ex's house, always Made sure that the phone was face-down Seems like overnight, I'm just the bitch you hate now We never talk it through How you guilt-tripped me to open up to you Then you logged out, leavin' me dumbfounded, oh-oh [...] [Bridge] All the silence just makes it worse, really 'Cause it leaves you so top-of-mind for me All the silence is just your strategy 'Cause it leaves you so top-of-mind for me

evidences.title: Watch Sabrina Carpenter reveal her 'greatest fear' in new 'SNL' promo - Mix 98.7
evidences.content: # Watch Sabrina Carpenter reveal her ‘greatest fear’ in new ‘SNL’ promo Sabrina Carpenter isn’t scared of hosting Saturday Night Live this weekend — but she is scared of something else. Sabrina’s hosting and performing on the show on Oct. 18, and in a new set of promos, she and cast member Marcello Hernandez discuss whether or not she’s “scared to host.” “Me? I perform in front of thousands of screaming fans every night,” Sabrina replies. “So you’re not scared?” Hernandez asks. She replies, “No. I’m terrified. But not of hosting. Deep down, my greatest fear is…” Then she and Hernandez both say at the same time, ” …My dentist grows a really long beard and during the appointment it tickles my chest.” The pair look at each other in shock and then walk offstage. [...] Also in the promos, Sabrina says, “I think I might need to arrest someone for being too hot” — which she does every night on her Short n’ Sweet tour. Hernandez, assuming she’s talking about him, laughs and says, “Well, I turn myself in.” Instead, Sabrina says, “You’re under arrest, cameraman!” pointing to the middle-aged, bald guy behind the camera. “Damn! Yeah I can’t compete with that,” says Hernandez. That moment is...

evidences.title: Sabrina Carpenter in 'SNL' Promos: Her & Marcello's 'Greatest Fear'
evidences.content: “So you’re not scared?” Hernandez asks, to which Carpenter responds, “No. I’m terrified. But not of hosting. Deep down, my greatest fear is…” At this point, Carpenter and Hernandez share their identical greatest fear in unison: ” …My dentist grows a really long beard and during the appointment it tickles my chest.” The pair look at each other stunned and just walk away. Elsewhere in the promos, Carpenter and Hernandez give a pep talk to any viewers who might be washing dishes, and Carpenter threatens to arrest the cameraman for being too hot — just like she does in the crowd on her Short n’ Sweet Tour. By Katie Atkinson ### Katie Atkinson Executive Digital Director, West Coast #### More Stories by Katie Host and musical guest Sabrina Carpenter and Marcello Hernandez during 'SNL' promos on Thusday, October 16, 2025. ### Trending on Billboard This weekend, Sabrina Carpenter will return to the Saturday...

evidences.title: Sabrina Carpenter – prfct Lyrics | Genius Lyrics
evidences.content: That’s the first song I wrote for Sin—, like the earliest song that I wrote that ended up going on the record. […] I tell everybody all the time, I really want someone to rip my heart out because I feel like I need that. I feel like I’ve been living a life where I’m, you know me, I’m like very focused, I love doing what I do, I like to like keep myself very busy, so I feel like the most inspirational thing for me will be for someone to literally just throw me off the rocker for a second and shake it up in a way that I haven’t felt before. So I think that that song, I wrote that with my fans in mind, I think that they are some of the most beautiful people I’ve ever met, they’re so sweet and they’re so funny and they, I don’t know, they put a lot of things into perspective for me, but you [...] Cover art for prfct by Sabrina Carpenter # prfct ## prfct Lyrics How to Format Lyrics: To learn more about adding songs to Genius, check out the complete transcription guide or visit the transcribers forum ## About “prfct” is a song from Sabrina’s album “Singular Act 1”. evidences.title: Sabrina Carpenter – Pocket Sized Lyrics | Genius Lyrics
evidences.content: Cover art for Pocket Sized by Sabrina Carpenter # Pocket Sized ## Pocket Sized Lyrics ## About Self-assurance and independence Sabrina Carpenter’s song “Pocket Sized” is a playful and catchy track that explores themes of self-assurance and independence. The lyrics reflect a girl’s confidence in her choices and the idea that she is more attractive when she is independent and helps around the house. The song is characterized by its humorous and witty lyrics, which often poke fun at societal expectations and the dynamics of relationships. It captures the essence of a modern, liberated woman who values her independence and self-worth, making it a standout track in Carpenter’s discography. ## Q&A Find answers to frequently asked questions about the song and explore its deeper meaning [...] ## Comments # Genius is the world’s biggest collection of song lyrics and musical knowledge Quantcast
